title: DungeonZ
description: Base mod to add new dungeons with one default dungeon
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/Azn4ci6.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/DungeonZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/DungeonZ/issues)


This mod is a base mod to add new dungeons to your world. You will be able to create a datapack which adds new dungeons which can get accessed via overworld structures. Those dungeons will be joinable with friends, offer good loot and usually have a cooldown. By default, two dungeons are added. For further info, how to add your own dungeon, check out the github readme. Other dungeons: - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nordic-tombs-dungeonz-addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nordic-tombs-dungeonz-addon) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-fantasy-orcish-depths](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-fantasy-orcish-depths) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/lY60Aby.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/Yfw3ACl.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
